message:
test: add single-table SELECT edge case conformance oracle tests

Coverage for BETWEEN, NOT BETWEEN, IN list, NOT IN, LIKE, GLOB,
DISTINCT, GROUP BY with expressions, ORDER BY computed columns,
WHERE AND/OR, IS NULL/IS NOT NULL, aggregate with WHERE filter,
and HAVING on computed expressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
